{{Infobox group
| name = Stormcallers
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

''See also: [[Stormcallers Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Stormcallers are a cult dedicated to the [[Weeping Dragon]], one of the [[Dreadgods]]. They serve as followers of [[Reigan Shen]] and are characterized by their use of lightning-based [[madra]]. Members often display distinctive Goldsigns, which appear as crackling [[scripts]] or rings of blue and gold lightning around their arms. Their combat style involves summoning living lightning from the sky, utilizing protective shields of [[madra]], and employing techniques that allow them to dominate battlefields by manipulating wind, water, and lightning. The sect possesses significant mobility and infrastructure, traveling on a large storm cloud that serves as a mobile base with various structures built upon it. While they lack a [[Herald]], they are led by a [[Sage]] known as the [[Sage of Calling Storms]]. The cult's power is derived from harvesting the unique [[madra]] and divine techniques of the [[Weeping Dragon]], which imbues its members with a portion of the [[Dreadgod]]'s animating will and hunger. They are known for their aggressive nature, including the ability to tear down enemy defenses and hunt opponents with intense fervor.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Stormcallers]] use [[scripts]] that crackle with lightning in their arms.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Stormcallers]] are a cult of the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Stormcallers]] are present in the area.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Stormcallers]] have a sect.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Stormcallers]] are a group/cult.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Stormcallers are a [[Dreadgod cult]] that follows the entity to utilize its divine techniques for stealing [[madra]]. This group, which includes [[Calan Archer]], travels upon a long storm cloud that produces rain. They employ lightning [[dragons]] capable of carrying [[madra]] back to their users and serve as one of the factions surrounding the valley. While the organization possesses one [[Sage]], they do not have a [[Herald]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Stormcallers]] follow the [[Dreadgod]] and use its divine techniques to steal [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Stormcallers]] are a group that includes [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Stormcallers]] are associated with a [[Dreadgod cult]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Stormcallers]] use lightning [[dragons]] that can carry [[madra]] back to a user.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Stormcallers]] travel on a long storm cloud that produces rain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Stormcallers]] are one of the groups surrounding the valley.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Stormcallers]] have one [[Sage]] but no [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Stormcallers]] tore down the [[Dawnwing sect]]'s defenses.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Stormcallers]] are held to the south by a serpentine raincloud.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Stormcallers]] are a group that was being cut off by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Stormcallers]] may be with the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Stormcallers]] call [[Kahn Mala]] '[[Daughter of Dread]]'.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Daughter of Dread,” Kahn Mala said. “It wasn’t my favorite choice, but the Stormcallers like it.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
